title: Gorilla Waterproof Black Coat & Seal Spray, 450ml – Flexible, Weatherproof Liquid Sealant | Seals out Water, Air & Moisture | For Roof Tiles, Brick, Wood, Metal, Concrete, Stone, Rubber, Plastics*
features: FLEXIBLE & WEATHERPROOF: Gorilla Waterproof Coat & Seal Spray offers durable protection with its flexible and weatherproof formula, ensuring reliable defense against the elements for various surfaces and applications.

SEALS OUT WATER, AIR & MOISTURE: Effectively seals out water, air, and moisture, providing robust defense against the elements for long-lasting durability and reliability. Once cured, the product is weatherproof and temperature resistant.

INDOOR & OUTDOOR: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, offering reliable protection against water, air, and moisture for various surfaces and environments. Can be used for sealing small cracks indoor and out.

GREAT FOR: Perfect for roofing, gutters, downpipes, windows/uPVC, external chimneys, and small repairs on caravans, providing effective sealing and protection. Not for flashing applications, pipes under pressure or for use inside firebox.
